response:
Nurse Emily organized a creative writing workshop for 24 residents, dividing them into groups of 6. This ensures personalized attention and support for each participant. With 4 groups formed, Emily plans to allocate 3 writing prompts per group for the session. 

In total, for the initial set of prompts, Emily will need 4 groups × 3 prompts = 12 prompts. To accommodate the possibility of groups wanting to continue writing, she has prepared an additional set of 10 extra prompts to be shared equally among all the groups. 

Emily also maintains a library of writing resources and encourages the use of the library for inspiration. The library serves as a valuable tool for the residents to explore different ideas and styles. 

Including both the initial and extra prompts, Emily will need a total of 12 + 10 = 22 writing prompts for the session. 

The END.
